base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of dark_cave_torch_mask_large — a effect_layer (spell_vfx) from 1986 dragon quest. Large torch-mask — ~7×7 visibility radius. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Large torch-mask — ~7×7 visibility radius; highest-level Radiant spell
